name: triangle-curling-spares
description: Spare management system for Triangle Curling Club

scripts.build: bun run --filter frontend build && bun run --filter backend build
scripts.prod:test: bun run build && bunx concurrently "bun run --filter backend start" "bun run --filter frontend preview"
scripts.openapi:generate: bun run --filter backend openapi:generate && bunx openapi-typescript backend/openapi.json -o frontend/src/api/generated/types.ts

author: Triangle Curling Club
